hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs organize DFSA reporting by connecting provider outputs, preserving audit evidence, and aligning jurisdiction-specific workflows into one operational system.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Reporting workflows slow with fragmented controls
problem_description: Compliance teams face inefficiencies when DFSA reporting inputs remain separated across multiple tools and providers. This disconnection complicates evidence tracking and delays audit-ready report preparation for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented DFSA reporting data, provider outputs, case evidence and compliance decisions into one structured workflow to streamline evidence tracking and accelerate audit-ready report preparation.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to DFSA reports
workflow_description: SFTY monitors jurisdictional regulatory changes and maps updates into internal rules that drive case creation, evidence collection and DFSA reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented reports. Structured DFSA workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into DFSA-specific workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to streamline reporting and maintain clear regulatory control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing DFSA reporting workflows with structured evidence, provider orchestration and enterprise-grade deployment for secure, auditable compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support DFSA compliance reporting workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how DFSA cases preserve audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs connect in DFSA reporting

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for DFSA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps DFSA-facing compliance teams connect regulatory rules, Travel Rule events, cases and reporting into one structured workflow tailored to jurisdiction-specific obligations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure DFSA reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes provider outputs, customer data and case information into reusable DFSA reporting workflows, supporting draft SAR/STR reports and regulatory review processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case evidence and provider outputs in an audit-ready format to support defensible DFSA compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected workflow layer without disrupting existing systems or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above existing providers, structuring and connecting outputs rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure DFSA reporting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects DFSA provider outputs into structured cases, audit evidence and reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
